1 && \"pr-5\")}\n                    >","originalFile":"import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/cn\";\nimport { Card } from \"@/components/ui/primitives\";\n\nexport interface Column<T> {\n  header: string;\n  cell: (row: T) => React.ReactNode;\n  align?: \"right\";\n  className?: string;\n}\n\ninterface DataTableProps<T> {\n  columns: Column<T>[];\n  rows: T[];\n  getRowId: (row: T) => string;\n  configured: boolean;\n  loading: boolean;\n  page: number;\n  maxPage: number;\n  count: number;\n  onPage: (p: number) => void;\n  emptyText?: string;\n  countNoun?: string;\n}\n\nexport function DataTable<T>({\n  columns,\n  rows,\n  getRowId,\n  configured,\n  loading,\n  page,\n  maxPage,\n  count,\n  onPage,\n  emptyText = \"No records found.\",\n  countNoun = \"records\",\n}: DataTableProps<T>) {\n  const span = columns.length;\n  return (\n    <Card className=\"overflow-hidden\">\n      <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\n        <table className=\"w-full text-[13.5px]\">\n          <thead>\n            <tr className=\"bg-surface-2 text-left text-[11.5px] uppercase tracking-wide text-ink-3\">\n              {columns.map((c, i) => (\n                <th\n                  key={i}\n                  className={cn(\"px-3 py-3 font-semibold\", c.align === \"right\" && \"text-right\", i === 0 && \"pl-5\", i === span - 1 && \"pr-5\", c.className)}\n                >\n                  {c.header}\n                </th>\n              ))}\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody>\n            {!configured ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={span} className=\"px-5 py-12 text-center text-sm text-ink-3\">Connect the API to load data.</td></tr>\n            ) : loading ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={span} className=\"px-5 py-12 text-center text-sm text-ink-3\">Loading…</td></tr>\n            ) : rows.length === 0 ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={span} className=\"px-5 py-12 text-center text-sm text-ink-3\">{emptyText}</td></tr>\n            ) : (\n              rows.map((row) => (\n                <tr key={getRowId(row)} className=\"border-t border-border hover:bg-surface-2\">\n                  {columns.map((c, i) => (\n                    <td\n                      key={i}\n                      className={cn(\"py-2.5\", c.align === \"right\" && \"text-right tnum\", i === 0 && \"pl-5 font-semibold\", i === span - 1 && \"pr-5\")}\n                    >\n                      {c.cell(row)}\n                    </td>\n                  ))}\n                </tr>\n              ))\n            )}\n          </tbody>\n        </table>\n      </div>\n\n      {configured && count > 0 && (\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 border-t border-border px-5 py-3\">\n          <span className=\"flex-1 text-xs text-ink-3\">\n            Page {page} of {maxPage} · {count.toLocaleString(\"en-IN\")} {countNoun}\n          </span>\n          <PagerBtn disabled={page <= 1} onClick={() => onPage(Math.max(1, page - 1))}>\n            <ChevronLeft className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n          </PagerBtn>\n          <PagerBtn disabled={page >= maxPage} onClick={() => onPage(Math.min(maxPage, page + 1))}>\n            <ChevronRight className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n          </PagerBtn>\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </Card>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction PagerBtn({ disabled, onClick, children }: { disabled?: boolean; onClick?: () => void; children: React.ReactNode }) {\n  return (\n    <button\n      disabled={disabled}\n      onClick={onClick}\n      className={cn(\n        \"grid h-8 w-8 place-items-center rounded-md border border-border bg-surface text-ink-2\",\n        \"disabled:opacity-40 enabled:hover:bg-surface-2\"\n      )}\n    >\n      {children}\n    </button>\n  );\n}\n\n/** Shared list-page header with title, count and a debounce-friendly search box. */\nexport function ListHeader({\n  title,\n  subtitle,\n  search,\n  onSearch,\n  searching,\n  placeholder = \"Search…\",\n}: {\n  title: string;\n  subtitle: string;\n  search: string;\n  onSearch: (v: string) => void;\n  searching?: boolean;\n  placeholder?: string;\n}) {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex items-end justify-between\">\n      <div>\n        <h1 className=\"text-[25px] font-bold tracking-tight\">{title}</h1>\n        <p className=\"mt-1 text-sm text-ink-2\">{subtitle}</p>\n      </div>\n      <label className=\"flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-border bg-surface px-3.5 py-2\">\n        <SearchIcon />\n        <input\n          value={search}\n          onChange={(e) => onSearch(e.target.value)}\n          placeholder={placeholder}\n          className=\"w-56 bg-transparent text-sm outline-none placeholder:text-ink-3\"\n        />\n        {searching && <span className=\"h-4 w-4 animate-spin rounded-full border-2 border-ink-3 border-t-transparent\" />}\n      </label>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction SearchIcon() {\n  return (\n    <svg className=\"h-4 w-4 text-ink-3\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)"}]},"uuid":"c052d786-13ad-48f0-8c78-1983ad9756a4","timestamp":"2026-06-25T08:22:47.230Z","toolUseResult":{"filePath":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2/src/features/sales/api.ts","oldString":"export function useCreateCustomer() {\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (input: NewCustomerInput) => {\n      const payload = {","newString":"function personPayload(input: NewCustomerInput) {\n  return {\n    firstName: input.firstName.trim(),\n    lastName: input.lastName?.trim() ?? \"\",\n    ...(input.email?.trim() ? { email: input.email.trim() } : {}),\n    phoneNumber: input.phoneNumber.trim(),\n    address1: input.address1?.trim() ?? \"\",\n    address2: input.address2?.trim() ?? \"\",\n    city: input.city?.trim() ?? \"\",\n    state: input.state?.trim() ?? \"\",\n    zip: input.zip?.trim() ?? \"\",\n    country: input.country?.trim() ?? \"\",\n    comments: input.comments?.trim() ?? \"\",\n  };\n}\n\n/** PATCH /customers/:id — update payload nests person (per CRA updateData). */\nexport function useUpdateCustomer() {\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: ({ id, input }: { id: number | string; input: NewCustomerInput }) =>\n      api.patch<CreatedCustomer>(`/customers/${id}`, { person: personPayload(input), gender: input.gender }),\n  });\n}\n\nexport function useCreateCustomer() {\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (input: NewCustomerInput) => {\n      const payload = {","originalFile":"import { useQuery, useMutation } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { api, isApiConfigured } from \"@/lib/apiClient\";\n\n/** Normalized item used by the POS. */\nexport interface PosItem {\n  id: number | string;\n  name: string;\n  price: number;\n  category: string;\n  categoryParentId?: number | string;\n  isService: boolean;\n  taxIncluded: boolean;\n  stock: number;\n}\n\ninterface RawLocationItem {\n  itemId?: number | string;\n  unitPrice?: number | string | null;\n  promoPrice?: number | string | null;\n  quantity?: number | string | null;\n  item?: {\n    itemId?: number | string;\n    name?: string;\n    isService?: boolean;\n    taxIncluded?: boolean;\n    unitPrice?: number | string | null;\n    promoPrice?: number | string | null;\n    category?: { name?: string; parentId?: number | string } | null;\n  };\n}\n\nfunction normalize(r: RawLocationItem): PosItem {\n  const it = r.item ?? {};\n  const price =\n    [r.promoPrice, r.unitPrice, it.promoPrice, it.unitPrice]\n      .map((v) => Number(v))\n      .find((n) => Number.isFinite(n) && n > 0) ?? 0;\n  return {\n    id: (r.itemId ?? it.itemId)!,\n    name: it.name ?? \"Item\",\n    price,\n    category: it.category?.name ?? \"\",\n    categoryParentId: it.category?.parentId ?? undefined,\n    isService: Boolean(it.isService),\n    taxIncluded: Boolean(it.taxIncluded),\n    stock: Number(r.quantity ?? 0) || 0,\n  };\n}\n\n/** GET /items/search?keyword= → flat array, normalized to PosItem. */\nexport function useItemSearch(keyword: string) {\n  return useQuery({\n    queryKey: [\"item-search\", keyword],\n    enabled: isApiConfigured() && keyword.trim().length > 0,\n    queryFn: async () => {\n      const rows = await api.get<RawLocationItem[]>(\n        `/items/search?keyword=${encodeURIComponent(keyword.trim())}`\n      );\n      return (Array.isArray(rows) ? rows : []).map(normalize);\n    },\n  });\n}\n\ninterface CategoryName {\n  id: number | string;\n  name: string;\n}\n\n/** GET /categories/names → id→name map (resolve a category's parent label). */\nexport function useCategoryNames() {\n  return useQuery({\n    queryKey: [\"category-names\"],\n    enabled: isApiConfigured(),\n    staleTime: 60 * 60 * 1000,\n    queryFn: async () => {\n      const res = await api.get<CategoryName[] | { categories?: CategoryName[] }>(\"/categories/names\");\n      const arr = Array.isArray(res) ? res : res.categories ?? [];\n      const map = new Map<string, string>();\n      arr.forEach((c) => map.set(String(c.id), c.name));\n      return map;\n    },\n  });\n}\n\n/* ---- Location: technicians + tax config (GET /locations/:id) ---- */\n\nexport interface Technician {\n  id: number | string;\n  name: string;\n}\nexport interface TaxConfig {\n  name1: string;\n  rate1: number;\n  name2: string;\n  rate2: number;\n}\n\ninterface RawLocation {\n  employeeConnection?: Array<{\n    person?: { id?: number | string; firstName?: string; lastName?: string };\n    employee?: {\n      id?: number | string;\n      personId?: number | string;\n      deleted?: boolean;\n      isCorporate?: boolean;\n      isOwner?: boolean;\n      person?: { id?: number | string; firstName?: string; lastName?: string };\n    };\n  }>;\n  taxRates?: Array<{ name?: string; rate?: number | string }>;\n  default_tax_1_rate?: number | string;\n  default_tax_1_name?: string;\n  default_tax_2_rate?: number | string;\n  default_tax_2_name?: string;\n  [k: string]: unknown;\n}\n\nexport function useLocation(locationId: number | string) {\n  return useQuery({\n    queryKey: [\"location\", locationId],\n    enabled: isApiConfigured() && locationId != null,\n    staleTime: 30 * 60 * 1000,\n    queryFn: () => api.get<RawLocation>(`/locations/${locationId}`),\n  });\n}\n\nexport function parseTechnicians(loc?: RawLocation): Technician[] {\n  const conn = loc?.employeeConnection ?? [];\n  return conn\n    .filter((c) => c.employee && c.employee.deleted === false && c.employee.isCorporate === false && c.employee.isOwner === false)\n    .map((c) => {\n      const p = c.person ?? c.employee?.person;\n      return {\n        id: (p?.id ?? c.employee?.personId ?? c.employee?.id)!,\n        name: [p?.firstName, p?.lastName].filter(Boolean).join(\" \") || \"Staff\",\n      };\n    });\n}\n\n/** Mirrors taxCalculations.getTaxConfiguration (Studio11 default 9% + 9%). */\nexport function parseTaxConfig(loc?: RawLocation): TaxConfig {\n  let rates: Array<{ name?: string; rate?: number | string }> | null = null;\n  if (Array.isArray(loc)) rates = loc;\n  else if (loc?.taxRates) rates = loc.taxRates;\n  else if (loc?.default_tax_1_rate != null)\n    rates = [\n      { name: loc.default_tax_1_name || \"CGST\", rate: loc.default_tax_1_rate },\n      { name: loc.default_tax_2_name || \"SGST\", rate: loc.default_tax_2_rate },\n    ];\n  const r1 = rates?.[0] ? Number(rates[0].rate) : NaN;\n  const r2 = rates?.[1] ? Number(rates[1].rate) : NaN;\n  if (!Number.isFinite(r1) || !Number.isFinite(r2)) {\n    return { name1: \"CGST\", rate1: 9, name2: \"SGST\", rate2: 9 };\n  }\n  return { name1: rates![0].name || \"CGST\", rate1: r1, name2: rates![1].name || \"SGST\", rate2: r2 };\n}\n\nexport interface CartLine {\n  item: PosItem;\n  qty: number;\n  technicianId: number | string | null;\n}\n\nexport interface Bill {\n  subtotal: number;\n  cgst: number;\n  sgst: number;\n  taxTotal: number;\n  total: number;\n}\n\n/** Per-line tax (inclusive vs exclusive), CGST/SGST split from the location config. */\nexport function computeBill(lines: CartLine[], tax: TaxConfig): Bill {\n  const rate = tax.rate1 + tax.rate2;\n  let subtotal = 0;\n  let cgst = 0;\n  let sgst = 0;\n  for (const l of lines) {\n    const gross = l.item.price * l.qty;\n    const base = l.item.taxIncluded && rate > 0 ? gross / (1 + rate / 100) : gross;\n    const lineTax = l.item.taxIncluded ? gross - base : (base * rate) / 100;\n    subtotal += base;\n    if (rate > 0) {\n      cgst += (lineTax * tax.rate1) / rate;\n      sgst += (lineTax * tax.rate2) / rate;\n    }\n  }\n  const r2 = (n: number) => Math.round(n * 100) / 100;\n  subtotal = r2(subtotal);\n  cgst = r2(cgst);\n  sgst = r2(sgst);\n  const taxTotal = r2(cgst + sgst);\n  return { subtotal, cgst, sgst, taxTotal, total: r2(subtotal + taxTotal) };\n}\n\n/* ---- Customer ---- */\n\nexport interface CustomerLite {\n  id?: number | string;\n  personId?: number | string;\n  person?: { id?: number | string; firstName?: string; lastName?: string; phoneNumber?: string };\n  points?: number | string;\n  loyaltyCardNumber?: string | null;\n  loyaltyCardDiscount?: number | string | null;\n  saleCount?: number | string;\n  lifetimeValue?: number | string;\n  birthday?: string | null;\n  anniversary?: string | null;\n  [k: string]: unknown;\n}\n\nexport function useCustomerByPhone(phone: string) {\n  return useQuery({\n    queryKey: [\"customer-phone\", phone],\n    enabled: isApiConfigured() && phone.replace(/\\D/g, \"\").length >= 10,\n    retry: false,\n    queryFn: () => api.get<CustomerLite>(`/customers/search/?phone=${encodeURIComponent(phone)}`),\n  });\n}\n\nexport const customerName = (c?: CustomerLite | null) =>\n  c ? [c.person?.firstName, c.person?.lastName].filter(Boolean).join(\" \") : \"\";\nexport const customerId = (c?: CustomerLite | null) => c?.person?.id ?? c?.personId ?? c?.id ?? null;\n\n/* ---- Create / suspend sale (POST /sales) ---- */\n\nexport function useCreateSale() {\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (payload: unknown) => api.post<{ id: number | string; stockWarnings?: unknown[] }>(`/sales`, payload),\n  });\n}\n\n/* ---- Create customer (POST /customers, flat payload) ---- */\n\nexport interface NewCustomerInput {\n  firstName: string;\n  lastName?: string;\n  email?: string;\n  phoneNumber: string;\n  gender: string;\n  address1?: string;\n  address2?: string;\n  city?: string;\n  state?: string;\n  zip?: string;\n  country?: string;\n  comments?: string;\n}\n\ninterface CreatedCustomer {\n  id?: number | string;\n  personId?: number | string;\n  person?: { id?: number | string };\n}\n\nexport function useCreateCustomer() {\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (input: NewCustomerInput) => {\n      const payload = {\n        firstName: input.firstName.trim(),\n        lastName: input.lastName?.trim() ?? \"\",\n        ...(input.email?.trim() ? { email: input.email.trim() } : {}),\n        phoneNumber: input.phoneNumber.trim(),\n        gender: input.gender,\n        address1: input.address1?.trim() ?? \"\",\n        address2: input.address2?.trim() ?? \"\",\n        city: input.city?.trim() ?? \"\",\n        state: input.state?.trim() ?? \"\",\n        zip: input.zip?.trim() ?? \"\",\n        country: input.country?.trim() ?? \"\",\n        comments: input.comments?.trim() ?? \"\",\n        points: 0,\n        currentSpendForPoints: 0,\n        companyAddress: \"\",\n        dndSms: false,\n        dndEmail: false,\n      };\n      return api.post<CreatedCustomer>(\"/customers\", payload);\n    },\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":253,"oldLines":6,"newStart":253,"newLines":30,"lines":["   person?: { id?: number | string };"," }"," ","+function personPayload(input: NewCustomerInput) {","+  return {","+    firstName: input.firstName.trim(),","+    lastName: input.lastName?.trim() ?? \"\",","+    ...(input.email?.trim() ? { email: input.email.trim() } : {}),","+    phoneNumber: input.phoneNumber.trim(),","+    address1: input.address1?.trim() ?? \"\",","+    address2: input.address2?.trim() ?? \"\",","+    city: input.city?.trim() ?? \"\",","+    state: input.state?.trim() ?? \"\",","+    zip: input.zip?.trim() ?? \"\",","+    country: input.country?.trim() ?? \"\",","+    comments: input.comments?.trim() ?? \"\",","+  };","+}","+","+/** PATCH /customers/:id — update payload nests person (per CRA updateData). */","+export function useUpdateCustomer() {","+  return useMutation({","+    mutationFn: ({ id, input }: { id: number | string; input: NewCustomerInput }) =>","+      api.patch<CreatedCustomer>(`/customers/${id}`, { person: personPayload(input), gender: input.gender }),","+  });","+}","+"," export function useCreateCustomer() {","   return useMutation({","     mutationFn: (input: NewCustomerInput) => {"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"1eb5aff1-0dbb-4a69-a675-8acf1d3d93fe","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2","sessionId":"872ce0df-5798-42c6-8c8a-7c55b2e4a344","version":"2.1.187","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"snuggly-honking-sloth"}

{"parentUuid":"d5cf6e99-4208-45f0-958f-8c85b6948d0e","isSidechain":false,"promptId":"0b433365-1567-44bc-af2c-45f4bb583047","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01GbyHvZB3WFJ88BVUcaJzpJ","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2/src/features/sales/NewCustomerModal.tsx has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)"}]},"uuid":"b75364fd-c5c0-4fe4-a2bd-bcbb849de6fc","timestamp":"2026-06-25T08:23:19.236Z","toolUseResult":{"filePath":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2/src/features/sales/NewCustomerModal.tsx","oldString":"import { useCreateCustomer, type CustomerLite } from \"./api\";","newString":"import { useCreateCustomer, useUpdateCustomer, type CustomerLite } from \"./api\";\n\nexport interface EditTarget {\n  id?: number | string;\n  gender?: string | number;\n  person?: {\n    firstName?: string; lastName?: string; email?: string; phoneNumber?: string;\n    address1?: string; address2?: string; city?: string; state?: string; zip?: string; country?: string; comments?: string;\n  };\n}","originalFile":"import { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { X, Loader2 } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/cn\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/primitives\";\nimport { useCreateCustomer, type CustomerLite } from \"./api\";\n\ntype Form = {\n  firstName: string; lastName: string; email: string; phoneNumber: string; gender: string;\n  address1: string; address2: string; city: string; state: string; zip: string; country: string; comments: string;\n};\nconst EMPTY: Form = {\n  firstName: \"\", lastName: \"\", email: \"\", phoneNumber: \"\", gender: \"\",\n  address1: \"\", address2: \"\", city: \"\", state: \"\", zip: \"\", country: \"\", comments: \"\",\n};\n\nfunction Field({ label, required, value, onChange, type = \"text\", textarea }: {\n  label: string; required?: boolean; value: string; onChange: (v: string) => void; type?: string; textarea?: boolean;\n}) {\n  const cls = \"w-full rounded-md border border-border bg-surface px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-brand\";\n  return (\n    <label className=\"grid grid-cols-[120px_1fr] items-center gap-3\">\n      <span className={cn(\"text-sm font-semibold\", required ? \"text-danger\" : \"text-ink-2\")}>\n        {label}{required ? \" *\" : \"\"}\n      </span>\n      {textarea ? (\n        <textarea value={value} onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)} rows={2} className={cls} />\n      ) : (\n        <input type={type} value={value} onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)} className={cls} />\n      )}\n    </label>\n  );\n}\n\nexport function NewCustomerModal({ open, onClose, defaultPhone, onCreated }: {\n  open: boolean;\n  onClose: () => void;\n  defaultPhone?: string;\n  onCreated: (c: CustomerLite) => void;\n}) {\n  const [f, setF] = useState<Form>(EMPTY);\n  const [err, setErr] = useState(\"\");\n  const create = useCreateCustomer();\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (open) { setF({ ...EMPTY, phoneNumber: defaultPhone ?? \"\" }); setErr(\"\"); }\n  }, [open, defaultPhone]);\n\n  if (!open) return null;\n  const set = (k: keyof Form) => (v: string) => setF((s) => ({ ...s, [k]: v }));\n\n  function submit(e: React.FormEvent) {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (!f.firstName.trim()) return setErr(\"First name is required.\");\n    if (!f.phoneNumber.trim()) return setErr(\"Phone number is required.\");\n    if (!f.gender) return setErr(\"Gender is required.\");\n    setErr(\"\");\n    create.mutate(f, {\n      onSuccess: (res) => {\n        const pid = res?.personId ?? res?.person?.id;\n        onCreated({\n          id: res?.id,\n          personId: pid,\n          person: { id: pid, firstName: f.firstName.trim(), lastName: f.lastName.trim(), phoneNumber: f.phoneNumber.trim() },\n          points: 0, saleCount: 0, lifetimeValue: 0,\n          loyaltyCardNumber: null, loyaltyCardDiscount: null, birthday: null, anniversary: null,\n        });\n        onClose();\n      },\n      onError: () => setErr(\"Could not create the customer. Check the required fields and try again.\"),\n    });\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 grid place-items-center bg-black/40 p-4\" onMouseDown={onClose}>\n      <div onMouseDown={(e) => e.stopPropagation()} className=\"max-h-[90vh] w-full max-w-[560px] overflow-auto rounded-lg border border-border bg-surface shadow-soft\">\n        <header className=\"flex items-center justify-between border-b border-border px-5 py-4\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold\">New Customer</h2>\n          <button onClick={onClose} aria-label=\"Close\" className=\"text-ink-3 hover:text-ink\"><X className=\"h-5 w-5\" /></button>\n        </header>\n        <form onSubmit={submit} className=\"grid gap-3 p-5\">\n          <p className=\"text-[13px] text-ink-2\">Customer information <span className=\"font-semibold text-danger\">(fields in red are required)</span></p>\n          <Field label=\"First Name\" required value={f.firstName} onChange={set(\"firstName\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Last Name\" value={f.lastName} onChange={set(\"lastName\")} />\n          <Field label=\"E-mail\" type=\"email\" value={f.email} onChange={set(\"email\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Phone Number\" required value={f.phoneNumber} onChange={set(\"phoneNumber\")} />\n          <label className=\"grid grid-cols-[120px_1fr] items-center gap-3\">\n            <span className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-danger\">Gender *</span>\n            <select\n              value={f.gender}\n              onChange={(e) => set(\"gender\")(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"w-full rounded-md border border-border bg-surface px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-brand\"\n            >\n              <option value=\"\">Select…</option>\n              <option value=\"0\">Male</option>\n              <option value=\"1\">Female</option>\n              <option value=\"2\">Other</option>\n            </select>\n          </label>\n          <Field label=\"Address 1\" value={f.address1} onChange={set(\"address1\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Address 2\" value={f.address2} onChange={set(\"address2\")} />\n          <Field label=\"City\" value={f.city} onChange={set(\"city\")} />\n          <Field label=\"State/Province\" value={f.state} onChange={set(\"state\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Zip\" value={f.zip} onChange={set(\"zip\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Country\" value={f.country} onChange={set(\"country\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Comments\" textarea value={f.comments} onChange={set(\"comments\")} />\n          {err && <div className=\"rounded-md bg-[var(--danger-soft)] px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-danger\">{err}</div>}\n          <div className=\"mt-1 flex justify-end gap-2\">\n            <Button type=\"button\" variant=\"default\" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>\n            <Button type=\"submit\" variant=\"primary\" disabled={create.isPending}>\n              {create.isPending ? <Loader2 className=\"h-4 w-4 animate-spin\" /> : null} Create customer\n            </Button>\n          </div>\n        </form>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":2,"oldLines":8,"newStart":2,"newLines":17,"lines":[" import { X, Loader2 } from \"lucide-react\";"," import { cn } from \"@/lib/cn\";"," import { Button } from \"@/components/ui/primitives\";","-import { useCreateCustomer, type CustomerLite } from \"./api\";","+import { useCreateCustomer, useUpdateCustomer, type CustomerLite } from \"./api\";"," ","+export interface EditTarget {","+  id?: number | string;","+  gender?: string | number;","+  person?: {","+    firstName?: string; lastName?: string; email?: string; phoneNumber?: string;","+    address1?: string; address2?: string; city?: string; state?: string; zip?: string; country?: string; comments?: string;","+  };","+}","+"," type Form = {","   firstName: string; lastName: string; email: string; phoneNumber: string; gender: string;","   address1: string; address2: string; city: string; state: string; zip: string; country: string; comments: string;"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"d5cf6e99-4208-45f0-958f-8c85b6948d0e","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2","sessionId":"872ce0df-5798-42c6-8c8a-7c55b2e4a344","version":"2.1.187","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"snuggly-honking-sloth"}
{"parentUuid":"b75364fd-c5c0-4fe4-a2bd-bcbb849de6fc","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_017GWVF5rNpKyoHDNbSxU3hj","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01QXeS4sjp8jB2qNzW6UkBxE","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2/src/features/sales/NewCustomerModal.tsx","old_string":"export function NewCustomerModal({ open, onClose, defaultPhone, onCreated }: {\n  open: boolean;\n  onClose: () => void;\n  defaultPhone?: string;\n  onCreated: (c: CustomerLite) => void;\n}) {\n  const [f, setF] = useState<Form>(EMPTY);\n  const [err, setErr] = useState(\"\");\n  const create = useCreateCustomer();\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (open) { setF({ ...EMPTY, phoneNumber: defaultPhone ?? \"\" }); setErr(\"\"); }\n  }, [open, defaultPhone]);\n\n  if (!open) return null;\n  const set = (k: keyof Form) => (v: string) => setF((s) => ({ ...s, [k]: v }));\n\n  function submit(e: React.FormEvent) {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (!f.firstName.trim()) return setErr(\"First name is required.\");\n    if (!f.phoneNumber.trim()) return setErr(\"Phone number is required.\");\n    if (!f.gender) return setErr(\"Gender is required.\");\n    setErr(\"\");\n    create.mutate(f, {\n      onSuccess: (res) => {\n        const pid = res?.personId ?? res?.person?.id;\n        onCreated({\n          id: res?.id,\n          personId: pid,\n          person: { id: pid, firstName: f.firstName.trim(), lastName: f.lastName.trim(), phoneNumber: f.phoneNumber.trim() },\n          points: 0, saleCount: 0, lifetimeValue: 0,\n          loyaltyCardNumber: null, loyaltyCardDiscount: null, birthday: null, anniversary: null,\n        });\n        onClose();\n      },\n      onError: () => setErr(\"Could not create the customer. Check the required fields and try again.\"),\n    });\n  }","new_string":"export function NewCustomerModal({ open, onClose, defaultPhone, editCustomer, onCreated }: {\n  open: boolean;\n  onClose: () => void;\n  defaultPhone?: string;\n  editCustomer?: EditTarget | null;\n  onCreated: (c: CustomerLite) => void;\n}) {\n  const isEdit = !!editCustomer;\n  const [f, setF] = useState<Form>(EMPTY);\n  const [err, setErr] = useState(\"\");\n  const create = useCreateCustomer();\n  const update = useUpdateCustomer();\n  const pending = create.isPending || update.isPending;\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!open) return;\n    setErr(\"\");\n    if (editCustomer) {\n      const p = editCustomer.person ?? {};\n      setF({\n        firstName: p.firstName ?? \"\", lastName: p.lastName ?? \"\", email: p.email ?? \"\",\n        phoneNumber: p.phoneNumber ?? \"\", gender: editCustomer.gender != null ? String(editCustomer.gender) : \"\",\n        address1: p.address1 ?? \"\", address2: p.address2 ?? \"\", city: p.city ?? \"\",\n        state: p.state ?? \"\", zip: p.zip ?? \"\", country: p.country ?? \"\", comments: p.comments ?? \"\",\n      });\n    } else {\n      setF({ ...EMPTY, phoneNumber: defaultPhone ?? \"\" });\n    }\n  }, [open, defaultPhone, editCustomer]);\n\n  if (!open) return null;\n  const set = (k: keyof Form) => (v: string) => setF((s) => ({ ...s, [k]: v }));\n\n  function submit(e: React.FormEvent) {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (!f.firstName.trim()) return setErr(\"First name is required.\");\n    if (!f.phoneNumber.trim()) return setErr(\"Phone number is required.\");\n    if (!f.gender) return setErr(\"Gender is required.\");\n    setErr(\"\");\n    const onSuccess = (res?: { id?: number | string; personId?: number | string; person?: { id?: number | string } }) => {\n      const pid = res?.personId ?? res?.person?.id ?? editCustomer?.id;\n      onCreated({\n        id: res?.id ?? editCustomer?.id,\n        personId: pid,\n        person: { id: pid, firstName: f.firstName.trim(), lastName: f.lastName.trim(), phoneNumber: f.phoneNumber.trim() },\n        points: 0, saleCount: 0, lifetimeValue: 0,\n        loyaltyCardNumber: null, loyaltyCardDiscount: null, birthday: null, anniversary: null,\n      });\n      onClose();\n    };\n    const onError = () => setErr(`Could not ${isEdit ? \"update\" : \"create\"} the customer. Check the fields and try again.`);\n    if (isEdit && editCustomer?.id != null) {\n      update.mutate({ id: editCustomer.id, input: f }, { onSuccess, onError });\n    } else {\n      create.mutate(f, { onSuccess, onError });\n    }\n  }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2675,"cache_read_input_tokens":919843,"output_tokens":1850,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":2675,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":1850,"cache_read_input_tokens":919843,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2675,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":2675},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"diagnostics":null},"requestId":"req_011CcPezfrnXQ549ADA7b3iY","type":"assistant","uuid":"0afd0869-f1c3-481b-ab9d-fc8ad53d14db","timestamp":"2026-06-25T08:23:40.010Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2","sessionId":"872ce0df-5798-42c6-8c8a-7c55b2e4a344","version":"2.1.187","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"snuggly-honking-sloth"}
{"parentUuid":"0afd0869-f1c3-481b-ab9d-fc8ad53d14db","isSidechain":false,"promptId":"0b433365-1567-44bc-af2c-45f4bb583047","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QXeS4sjp8jB2qNzW6UkBxE","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2/src/features/sales/NewCustomerModal.tsx has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)"}]},"uuid":"045f03cd-c915-42c2-a7c1-d9b4cb2750f8","timestamp":"2026-06-25T08:23:40.166Z","toolUseResult":{"filePath":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2/src/features/sales/NewCustomerModal.tsx","oldString":"export function NewCustomerModal({ open, onClose, defaultPhone, onCreated }: {\n  open: boolean;\n  onClose: () => void;\n  defaultPhone?: string;\n  onCreated: (c: CustomerLite) => void;\n}) {\n  const [f, setF] = useState<Form>(EMPTY);\n  const [err, setErr] = useState(\"\");\n  const create = useCreateCustomer();\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (open) { setF({ ...EMPTY, phoneNumber: defaultPhone ?? \"\" }); setErr(\"\"); }\n  }, [open, defaultPhone]);\n\n  if (!open) return null;\n  const set = (k: keyof Form) => (v: string) => setF((s) => ({ ...s, [k]: v }));\n\n  function submit(e: React.FormEvent) {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (!f.firstName.trim()) return setErr(\"First name is required.\");\n    if (!f.phoneNumber.trim()) return setErr(\"Phone number is required.\");\n    if (!f.gender) return setErr(\"Gender is required.\");\n    setErr(\"\");\n    create.mutate(f, {\n      onSuccess: (res) => {\n        const pid = res?.personId ?? res?.person?.id;\n        onCreated({\n          id: res?.id,\n          personId: pid,\n          person: { id: pid, firstName: f.firstName.trim(), lastName: f.lastName.trim(), phoneNumber: f.phoneNumber.trim() },\n          points: 0, saleCount: 0, lifetimeValue: 0,\n          loyaltyCardNumber: null, loyaltyCardDiscount: null, birthday: null, anniversary: null,\n        });\n        onClose();\n      },\n      onError: () => setErr(\"Could not create the customer. Check the required fields and try again.\"),\n    });\n  }","newString":"export function NewCustomerModal({ open, onClose, defaultPhone, editCustomer, onCreated }: {\n  open: boolean;\n  onClose: () => void;\n  defaultPhone?: string;\n  editCustomer?: EditTarget | null;\n  onCreated: (c: CustomerLite) => void;\n}) {\n  const isEdit = !!editCustomer;\n  const [f, setF] = useState<Form>(EMPTY);\n  const [err, setErr] = useState(\"\");\n  const create = useCreateCustomer();\n  const update = useUpdateCustomer();\n  const pending = create.isPending || update.isPending;\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!open) return;\n    setErr(\"\");\n    if (editCustomer) {\n      const p = editCustomer.person ?? {};\n      setF({\n        firstName: p.firstName ?? \"\", lastName: p.lastName ?? \"\", email: p.email ?? \"\",\n        phoneNumber: p.phoneNumber ?? \"\", gender: editCustomer.gender != null ? String(editCustomer.gender) : \"\",\n        address1: p.address1 ?? \"\", address2: p.address2 ?? \"\", city: p.city ?? \"\",\n        state: p.state ?? \"\", zip: p.zip ?? \"\", country: p.country ?? \"\", comments: p.comments ?? \"\",\n      });\n    } else {\n      setF({ ...EMPTY, phoneNumber: defaultPhone ?? \"\" });\n    }\n  }, [open, defaultPhone, editCustomer]);\n\n  if (!open) return null;\n  const set = (k: keyof Form) => (v: string) => setF((s) => ({ ...s, [k]: v }));\n\n  function submit(e: React.FormEvent) {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (!f.firstName.trim()) return setErr(\"First name is required.\");\n    if (!f.phoneNumber.trim()) return setErr(\"Phone number is required.\");\n    if (!f.gender) return setErr(\"Gender is required.\");\n    setErr(\"\");\n    const onSuccess = (res?: { id?: number | string; personId?: number | string; person?: { id?: number | string } }) => {\n      const pid = res?.personId ?? res?.person?.id ?? editCustomer?.id;\n      onCreated({\n        id: res?.id ?? editCustomer?.id,\n        personId: pid,\n        person: { id: pid, firstName: f.firstName.trim(), lastName: f.lastName.trim(), phoneNumber: f.phoneNumber.trim() },\n        points: 0, saleCount: 0, lifetimeValue: 0,\n        loyaltyCardNumber: null, loyaltyCardDiscount: null, birthday: null, anniversary: null,\n      });\n      onClose();\n    };\n    const onError = () => setErr(`Could not ${isEdit ? \"update\" : \"create\"} the customer. Check the fields and try again.`);\n    if (isEdit && editCustomer?.id != null) {\n      update.mutate({ id: editCustomer.id, input: f }, { onSuccess, onError });\n    } else {\n      create.mutate(f, { onSuccess, onError });\n    }\n  }","originalFile":"import { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { X, Loader2 } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/cn\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/primitives\";\nimport { useCreateCustomer, useUpdateCustomer, type CustomerLite } from \"./api\";\n\nexport interface EditTarget {\n  id?: number | string;\n  gender?: string | number;\n  person?: {\n    firstName?: string; lastName?: string; email?: string; phoneNumber?: string;\n    address1?: string; address2?: string; city?: string; state?: string; zip?: string; country?: string; comments?: string;\n  };\n}\n\ntype Form = {\n  firstName: string; lastName: string; email: string; phoneNumber: string; gender: string;\n  address1: string; address2: string; city: string; state: string; zip: string; country: string; comments: string;\n};\nconst EMPTY: Form = {\n  firstName: \"\", lastName: \"\", email: \"\", phoneNumber: \"\", gender: \"\",\n  address1: \"\", address2: \"\", city: \"\", state: \"\", zip: \"\", country: \"\", comments: \"\",\n};\n\nfunction Field({ label, required, value, onChange, type = \"text\", textarea }: {\n  label: string; required?: boolean; value: string; onChange: (v: string) => void; type?: string; textarea?: boolean;\n}) {\n  const cls = \"w-full rounded-md border border-border bg-surface px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-brand\";\n  return (\n    <label className=\"grid grid-cols-[120px_1fr] items-center gap-3\">\n      <span className={cn(\"text-sm font-semibold\", required ? \"text-danger\" : \"text-ink-2\")}>\n        {label}{required ? \" *\" : \"\"}\n      </span>\n      {textarea ? (\n        <textarea value={value} onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)} rows={2} className={cls} />\n      ) : (\n        <input type={type} value={value} onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)} className={cls} />\n      )}\n    </label>\n  );\n}\n\nexport function NewCustomerModal({ open, onClose, defaultPhone, onCreated }: {\n  open: boolean;\n  onClose: () => void;\n  defaultPhone?: string;\n  onCreated: (c: CustomerLite) => void;\n}) {\n  const [f, setF] = useState<Form>(EMPTY);\n  const [err, setErr] = useState(\"\");\n  const create = useCreateCustomer();\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (open) { setF({ ...EMPTY, phoneNumber: defaultPhone ?? \"\" }); setErr(\"\"); }\n  }, [open, defaultPhone]);\n\n  if (!open) return null;\n  const set = (k: keyof Form) => (v: string) => setF((s) => ({ ...s, [k]: v }));\n\n  function submit(e: React.FormEvent) {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (!f.firstName.trim()) return setErr(\"First name is required.\");\n    if (!f.phoneNumber.trim()) return setErr(\"Phone number is required.\");\n    if (!f.gender) return setErr(\"Gender is required.\");\n    setErr(\"\");\n    create.mutate(f, {\n      onSuccess: (res) => {\n        const pid = res?.personId ?? res?.person?.id;\n        onCreated({\n          id: res?.id,\n          personId: pid,\n          person: { id: pid, firstName: f.firstName.trim(), lastName: f.lastName.trim(), phoneNumber: f.phoneNumber.trim() },\n          points: 0, saleCount: 0, lifetimeValue: 0,\n          loyaltyCardNumber: null, loyaltyCardDiscount: null, birthday: null, anniversary: null,\n        });\n        onClose();\n      },\n      onError: () => setErr(\"Could not create the customer. Check the required fields and try again.\"),\n    });\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 grid place-items-center bg-black/40 p-4\" onMouseDown={onClose}>\n      <div onMouseDown={(e) => e.stopPropagation()} className=\"max-h-[90vh] w-full max-w-[560px] overflow-auto rounded-lg border border-border bg-surface shadow-soft\">\n        <header className=\"flex items-center justify-between border-b border-border px-5 py-4\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold\">New Customer</h2>\n          <button onClick={onClose} aria-label=\"Close\" className=\"text-ink-3 hover:text-ink\"><X className=\"h-5 w-5\" /></button>\n        </header>\n        <form onSubmit={submit} className=\"grid gap-3 p-5\">\n          <p className=\"text-[13px] text-ink-2\">Customer information <span className=\"font-semibold text-danger\">(fields in red are required)</span></p>\n          <Field label=\"First Name\" required value={f.firstName} onChange={set(\"firstName\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Last Name\" value={f.lastName} onChange={set(\"lastName\")} />\n          <Field label=\"E-mail\" type=\"email\" value={f.email} onChange={set(\"email\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Phone Number\" required value={f.phoneNumber} onChange={set(\"phoneNumber\")} />\n          <label className=\"grid grid-cols-[120px_1fr] items-center gap-3\">\n            <span className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-danger\">Gender *</span>\n            <select\n              value={f.gender}\n              onChange={(e) => set(\"gender\")(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"w-full rounded-md border border-border bg-surface px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-brand\"\n            >\n              <option value=\"\">Select…</option>\n              <option value=\"0\">Male</option>\n              <option value=\"1\">Female</option>\n              <option value=\"2\">Other</option>\n            </select>\n          </label>\n          <Field label=\"Address 1\" value={f.address1} onChange={set(\"address1\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Address 2\" value={f.address2} onChange={set(\"address2\")} />\n          <Field label=\"City\" value={f.city} onChange={set(\"city\")} />\n          <Field label=\"State/Province\" value={f.state} onChange={set(\"state\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Zip\" value={f.zip} onChange={set(\"zip\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Country\" value={f.country} onChange={set(\"country\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Comments\" textarea value={f.comments} onChange={set(\"comments\")} />\n          {err && <div className=\"rounded-md bg-[var(--danger-soft)] px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-danger\">{err}</div>}\n          <div className=\"mt-1 flex justify-end gap-2\">\n            <Button type=\"button\" variant=\"default\" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>\n            <Button type=\"submit\" variant=\"primary\" disabled={create.isPending}>\n              {create.isPending ? <Loader2 className=\"h-4 w-4 animate-spin\" /> : null} Create customer\n            </Button>\n          </div>\n        </form>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":40,"oldLines":19,"newStart":40,"newLines":35,"lines":["   );"," }"," ","-export function NewCustomerModal({ open, onClose, defaultPhone, onCreated }: {","+export function NewCustomerModal({ open, onClose, defaultPhone, editCustomer, onCreated }: {","   open: boolean;","   onClose: () => void;","   defaultPhone?: string;","+  editCustomer?: EditTarget | null;","   onCreated: (c: CustomerLite) => void;"," }) {","+  const isEdit = !!editCustomer;","   const [f, setF] = useState<Form>(EMPTY);","   const [err, setErr] = useState(\"\");","   const create = useCreateCustomer();","+  const update = useUpdateCustomer();","+  const pending = create.isPending || update.isPending;"," ","   useEffect(() => {","-    if (open) editCustomer.person ?? {};","+      setF({","+        firstName: p.firstName ?? \"\", lastName: p.lastName ?? \"\", email: p.email ?? \"\",","+        phoneNumber: p.phoneNumber ?? \"\", gender: editCustomer.gender != null ? String(editCustomer.gender) : \"\",","+        address1: p.address1 ?? \"\", address2: p.address2 ?? \"\", city: p.city ?? \"\",","+        state: p.state ?? \"\", zip: p.zip ?? \"\", country: p.country ?? \"\", comments: p.comments ?? \"\",","+      });","+    } else {","+      setF({ ...EMPTY, phoneNumber: defaultPhone ?? \"\" });","+    }","+  }, [open, defaultPhone, editCustomer]);"," ","   if (!open) return null;","   const set = (k: keyof Form) => (v: string) => setF((s) => ({ ...s, [k]: v }));"]},{"oldStart":63,"oldLines":20,"newStart":79,"newLines":23,"lines":["     if (!f.phoneNumber.trim()) return setErr(\"Phone number is required.\");","     if (!f.gender) return setErr(\"Gender is required.\");","     setErr(\"\");","-    create.mutate(f, {","-      onSuccess: (res) => {","-        const pid = res?.personId ?? res?.person?.id;","-        onCreated({","-          id: res?.id,","-          personId: pid,","-          person: { id: pid, firstName: f.firstName.trim(), lastName: f.lastName.trim(), phoneNumber: f.phoneNumber.trim() },","-          points: 0, saleCount: 0, lifetimeValue: 0,","-          loyaltyCardNumber: null, loyaltyCardDiscount: null, birthday: null, anniversary: null,","-        });","-        onClose();","-      },","-      onError: () => setErr(\"Could not create the customer. Check the required fields and try again.\"),","-    });","+    const onSuccess = (res?: { id?: number | string; personId?: number | string; person?: { id?: number | string } }) => {","+      const pid = res?.personId ?? res?.person?.id ?? editCustomer?.id;","+      onCreated({","+        id: res?.id ?? editCustomer?.id,","+        personId: pid,","+        person: { id: pid, firstName: f.firstName.trim(), lastName: f.lastName.trim(), phoneNumber: f.phoneNumber.trim() },","+        points: 0, saleCount: 0, lifetimeValue: 0,","+        loyaltyCardNumber: null, loyaltyCardDiscount: null, birthday: null, anniversary: null,","+      });","+      onClose();","+    };","+    const onError = () => setErr(`Could not ${isEdit ? \"update\" : \"create\"} the customer. Check the fields and try again.`);","+    if (isEdit && editCustomer?.id != null) {","+      update.mutate({ id: editCustomer.id, input: f }, { onSuccess, onError });","+    } else {","+      create.mutate(f, { onSuccess, onError });","+    }","   }"," ","   return ("]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"0afd0869-f1c3-481b-ab9d-fc8ad53d14db","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2","sessionId":"872ce0df-5798-42c6-8c8a-7c55b2e4a344","version":"2.1.187","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"snuggly-honking-sloth"}

\"Edit Customer\" : \"New Customer\"}</h2>","originalFile":"import { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { X, Loader2 } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/cn\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/primitives\";\nimport { useCreateCustomer, useUpdateCustomer, type CustomerLite } from \"./api\";\n\nexport interface EditTarget {\n  id?: number | string;\n  gender?: string | number;\n  person?: {\n    firstName?: string; lastName?: string; email?: string; phoneNumber?: string;\n    address1?: string; address2?: string; city?: string; state?: string; zip?: string; country?: string; comments?: string;\n  };\n}\n\ntype Form = {\n  firstName: string; lastName: string; email: string; phoneNumber: string; gender: string;\n  address1: string; address2: string; city: string; state: string; zip: string; country: string; comments: string;\n};\nconst EMPTY: Form = {\n  firstName: \"\", lastName: \"\", email: \"\", phoneNumber: \"\", gender: \"\",\n  address1: \"\", address2: \"\", city: \"\", state: \"\", zip: \"\", country: \"\", comments: \"\",\n};\n\nfunction Field({ label, required, value, onChange, type = \"text\", textarea }: {\n  label: string; required?: boolean; value: string; onChange: (v: string) => void; type?: string; textarea?: boolean;\n}) {\n  const cls = \"w-full rounded-md border border-border bg-surface px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-brand\";\n  return (\n    <label className=\"grid grid-cols-[120px_1fr] items-center gap-3\">\n      <span className={cn(\"text-sm font-semibold\", required ? \"text-danger\" : \"text-ink-2\")}>\n        {label}{required ? \" *\" : \"\"}\n      </span>\n      {textarea ? (\n        <textarea value={value} onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)} rows={2} className={cls} />\n      ) : (\n        <input type={type} value={value} onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)} className={cls} />\n      )}\n    </label>\n  );\n}\n\nexport function NewCustomerModal({ open, onClose, defaultPhone, editCustomer, onCreated }: {\n  open: boolean;\n  onClose: () => void;\n  defaultPhone?: string;\n  editCustomer?: EditTarget | null;\n  onCreated: (c: CustomerLite) => void;\n}) {\n  const isEdit = !!editCustomer;\n  const [f, setF] = useState<Form>(EMPTY);\n  const [err, setErr] = useState(\"\");\n  const create = useCreateCustomer();\n  const update = useUpdateCustomer();\n  const pending = create.isPending || update.isPending;\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!open) return;\n    setErr(\"\");\n    if (editCustomer) {\n      const p = editCustomer.person ?? {};\n      setF({\n        firstName: p.firstName ?? \"\", lastName: p.lastName ?? \"\", email: p.email ?? \"\",\n        phoneNumber: p.phoneNumber ?? \"\", gender: editCustomer.gender != null ? String(editCustomer.gender) : \"\",\n        address1: p.address1 ?? \"\", address2: p.address2 ?? \"\", city: p.city ?? \"\",\n        state: p.state ?? \"\", zip: p.zip ?? \"\", country: p.country ?? \"\", comments: p.comments ?? \"\",\n      });\n    } else {\n      setF({ ...EMPTY, phoneNumber: defaultPhone ?? \"\" });\n    }\n  }, [open, defaultPhone, editCustomer]);\n\n  if (!open) return null;\n  const set = (k: keyof Form) => (v: string) => setF((s) => ({ ...s, [k]: v }));\n\n  function submit(e: React.FormEvent) {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (!f.firstName.trim()) return setErr(\"First name is required.\");\n    if (!f.phoneNumber.trim()) return setErr(\"Phone number is required.\");\n    if (!f.gender) return setErr(\"Gender is required.\");\n    setErr(\"\");\n    const onSuccess = (res?: { id?: number | string; personId?: number | string; person?: { id?: number | string } }) => {\n      const pid = res?.personId ?? res?.person?.id ?? editCustomer?.id;\n      onCreated({\n        id: res?.id ?? editCustomer?.id,\n        personId: pid,\n        person: { id: pid, firstName: f.firstName.trim(), lastName: f.lastName.trim(), phoneNumber: f.phoneNumber.trim() },\n        points: 0, saleCount: 0, lifetimeValue: 0,\n        loyaltyCardNumber: null, loyaltyCardDiscount: null, birthday: null, anniversary: null,\n      });\n      onClose();\n    };\n    const onError = () => setErr(`Could not ${isEdit ? \"update\" : \"create\"} the customer. Check the fields and try again.`);\n    if (isEdit && editCustomer?.id != null) {\n      update.mutate({ id: editCustomer.id, input: f }, { onSuccess, onError });\n    } else {\n      create.mutate(f, { onSuccess, onError });\n    }\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 grid place-items-center bg-black/40 p-4\" onMouseDown={onClose}>\n      <div onMouseDown={(e) => e.stopPropagation()} className=\"max-h-[90vh] w-full max-w-[560px] overflow-auto rounded-lg border border-border bg-surface shadow-soft\">\n        <header className=\"flex items-center justify-between border-b border-border px-5 py-4\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold\">New Customer</h2>\n          <button onClick={onClose} aria-label=\"Close\" className=\"text-ink-3 hover:text-ink\"><X className=\"h-5 w-5\" /></button>\n        </header>\n        <form onSubmit={submit} className=\"grid gap-3 p-5\">\n          <p className=\"text-[13px] text-ink-2\">Customer information <span className=\"font-semibold text-danger\">(fields in red are required)</span></p>\n          <Field label=\"First Name\" required value={f.firstName} onChange={set(\"firstName\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Last Name\" value={f.lastName} onChange={set(\"lastName\")} />\n          <Field label=\"E-mail\" type=\"email\" value={f.email} onChange={set(\"email\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Phone Number\" required value={f.phoneNumber} onChange={set(\"phoneNumber\")} />\n          <label className=\"grid grid-cols-[120px_1fr] items-center gap-3\">\n            <span className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-danger\">Gender *</span>\n            <select\n              value={f.gender}\n              onChange={(e) => set(\"gender\")(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"w-full rounded-md border border-border bg-surface px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none focus:border-brand\"\n            >\n              <option value=\"\">Select…</option>\n              <option value=\"0\">Male</option>\n              <option value=\"1\">Female</option>\n              <option value=\"2\">Other</option>\n            </select>\n          </label>\n          <Field label=\"Address 1\" value={f.address1} onChange={set(\"address1\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Address 2\" value={f.address2} onChange={set(\"address2\")} />\n          <Field label=\"City\" value={f.city} onChange={set(\"city\")} />\n          <Field label=\"State/Province\" value={f.state} onChange={set(\"state\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Zip\" value={f.zip} onChange={set(\"zip\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Country\" value={f.country} onChange={set(\"country\")} />\n          <Field label=\"Comments\" textarea value={f.comments} onChange={set(\"comments\")} />\n          {err && <div className=\"rounded-md bg-[var(--danger-soft)] px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-danger\">{err}</div>}\n          <div className=\"mt-1 flex justify-end gap-2\">\n            <Button type=\"button\" variant=\"default\" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>\n            <Button type=\"submit\" variant=\"primary\" disabled={create.isPending}>\n              {create.isPending ? <Loader2 className=\"h-4 w-4 animate-spin\" /> : null} Create customer\n            </Button>\n          </div>\n        </form>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":102,"oldLines":7,"newStart":102,"newLines":7,"lines":["     <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 grid place-items-center bg-black/40 p-4\" {"parentUuid":"0ae71892-2cd6-4430-8b19-8b4c3e3b06d0","isSidechain":false,"promptId":"0b433365-1567-44bc-af2c-45f4bb583047","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01RfLiTzmgwxNtfj8b7GAqCK","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2/src/features/customers/Customers.tsx has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)"}]},"uuid":"d1673ddb-ad17-44b6-b78a-040174989919","timestamp":"2026-06-25T08:24:28.745Z","toolUseResult":{"filePath":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2/src/features/customers/Customers.tsx","oldString":"  const [source, setSource] = useState(\"\");\n  const [gender, setGender] = useState(\"\");\n  const [newOpen, setNewOpen] = useState(false);","newString":"  const [source, setSource] = useState(\"\");\n  const [gender, setGender] = useState(\"\");\n  const [newOpen, setNewOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [editCustomer, setEditCustomer] = useState<Customer | null>(null);","originalFile":"import { useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useQueryClient } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { Search, Plus, Loader2 } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { isApiConfigured } from \"@/lib/apiClient\";\nimport { useListState } from \"@/lib/useListState\";\nimport { DataTable, type Column } from \"@/components/DataTable\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/primitives\";\nimport { NewCustomerModal } from \"@/features/sales/NewCustomerModal\";\nimport { useCustomers, useLeadSources, type Customer } from \"./api\";\n\nconst LIMIT = 20;\n\nconst fullName = (c: Customer) =>\n  [c.person?.firstName, c.person?.lastName].filter(Boolean).join(\" \") || \"—\";\n\nconst genderLabel = (g: Customer[\"gender\"]) => {\n  const s = String(g ?? \"\");\n  if (s === \"0\" || /^male$/i.test(s)) return \"Male\";\n  if (s === \"1\" || /^female$/i.test(s)) return \"Female\";\n  return s ? s : \"—\";\n};\n\nconst fmtDate = (d?: string) => {\n  if (!d) return \"—\";\n  const dt = new Date(d);\n  return isNaN(dt.getTime()) ? d : dt.toLocaleDateString(\"en-IN\", { day: \"numeric\", month: \"short\", year: \"numeric\" });\n};\n\nexport function Customers() {\n  const { search, setSearch, debounced, page, setPage } = useListState();\n  const [source, setSource] = useState(\"\");\n  const [gender, setGender] = useState(\"\");\n  const [newOpen, setNewOpen] = useState(false);\n  const configured = isApiConfigured();\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n\n  const { data, isLoading, isFetching } = useCustomers(page, LIMIT, debounced, source, gender);\n  const { data: sources } = useLeadSources();\n\n  const sourceMap = useMemo(() => {\n    const m = new Map<string, string>();\n    (sources ?? []).forEach((s) => m.set(String(s.id), s.source));\n    return m;\n  }, [sources]);\n\n  const count = data?.count ?? 0;\n\n  const columns: Column<Customer>[] = [\n    { header: \"Name\", cell: fullName },\n    { header: \"Phone\", cell: (c) => <span className=\"tnum\">{c.person?.phoneNumber ?? \"—\"}</span> },\n    { header: \"Loyalty card\", cell: (c) => c.loyaltyCardNumber || \"NA\" },\n    { header: \"Source\", cell: (c) => (c.sourceId != null ? sourceMap.get(String(c.sourceId)) ?? \"—\" : \"—\") },\n    { header: \"Gender\", cell: (c) => genderLabel(c.gender) },\n    { header: \"Points\", align: \"right\", cell: (c) => Number(c.points ?? 0) },\n    { header: \"Created\", cell: (c) => fmtDate(c.createdDate) },\n  ];\n\n  const selectCls = \"h-[38px] rounded-full border border-border bg-surface px-3.5 text-sm text-ink-2 outline-none focus:border-brand\";\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex flex-col gap-5\">\n      <div className=\"flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-[25px] font-bold tracking-tight\">Customers</h1>\n        {configured && (\n          <span className=\"grid h-7 min-w-7 place-items-center rounded-full bg-surface-2 px-2 text-sm font-semibold text-ink-2\">\n            {count.toLocaleString(\"en-IN\")}\n          </span>\n        )}\n        <div className=\"flex-1\" />\n        <Button variant=\"primary\" onClick={() => setNewOpen(true)}>\n          <Plus className=\"h-4 w-4\" /> New Customer\n        </Button>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3\">\n        <label className=\"flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-border bg-surface px-3.5 py-2\">\n          <Search className=\"h-4 w-4 text-ink-3\" />\n          <input\n            value={search}\n            onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}\n            placeholder=\"Search name, phone…\"\n            className=\"w-56 bg-transparent text-sm outline-none placeholder:text-ink-3\"\n          />\n          {isFetching && <Loader2 className=\"h-4 w-4 animate-spin text-ink-3\" />}\n        </label>\n\n        <select value={source} onChange={(e) => { setSource(e.target.value); setPage(1); }} className={selectCls}>\n          <option value=\"\">Lead Source</option>\n          {(sources ?? []).map((s) => (\n            <option key={String(s.id)} value={String(s.id)}>{s.source}</option>\n          ))}\n        </select>\n\n        <select value={gender} onChange={(e) => { setGender(e.target.value); setPage(1); }} className={selectCls}>\n          <option value=\"\">Gender</option>\n          <option value=\"0\">Male</option>\n          <option value=\"1\">Female</option>\n          <option value=\"2\">Other</option>\n        </select>\n      </div>\n\n      <DataTable\n        columns={columns}\n        rows={data?.customers ?? []}\n        getRowId={(c) => String(c.personId ?? c.id ?? c.loyaltyCardNumber ?? c.person?.phoneNumber)}\n        configured={configured}\n        loading={isLoading}\n        page={page}\n        maxPage={Math.max(1, Math.ceil(count / LIMIT))}\n        count={count}\n        onPage={setPage}\n        emptyText=\"No customers found.\"\n        countNoun=\"customers\"\n      />\n\n      <NewCustomerModal\n        open={newOpen}\n        onClose={() => setNewOpen(false)}\n        onCreated={() => qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"customers\"] })}\n      />\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":31,"oldLines":6,"newStart":31,"newLines":7,"lines":["   const [source, setSource] = useState(\"\");","   const [gender, setGender] = useState(\"\");","   const [newOpen, setNewOpen] = useState(false);","+  const [editCustomer, setEditCustomer] = useState<Customer | null>(null);","   const configured = isApiConfigured();","   const qc = useQueryClient();"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"0ae71892-2cd6-4430-8b19-8b4c3e3b06d0","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2","sessionId":"872ce0df-5798-42c6-8c8a-7c55b2e4a344","version":"2.1.187","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"snuggly-honking-sloth"}

\"\");\n  if (s === \"0\" || /^male$/i.test(s)) return \"Male\";\n  if (s === \"1\" || /^female$/i.test(s)) return \"Female\";\n  return s ? s : \"—\";\n};\n\nconst fmtDate = (d?: string) => {\n  if (!d) return \"—\";\n  const dt = new Date(d);\n  return isNaN(dt.getTime()) ? d : dt.toLocaleDateString(\"en-IN\", { day: \"numeric\", month: \"short\", year: \"numeric\" });\n};\n\nexport function Customers() {\n  const { search, setSearch, debounced, page, setPage } = useListState();\n  const [source, setSource] = useState(\"\");\n  const [gender, setGender] = useState(\"\");\n  const [newOpen, setNewOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [editCustomer, setEditCustomer] = useState<Customer | null>(null);\n  const configured = isApiConfigured();\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n\n  const { data, isLoading, isFetching } = useCustomers(page, LIMIT, debounced, source, gender);\n  const { data: sources } = useLeadSources();\n\n  const sourceMap = useMemo(() => {\n    const m = new Map<string, string>();\n    (sources ?? []).forEach((s) => m.set(String(s.id), s.source));\n    return m;\n  }, [sources]);\n\n  const count = data?.count ?? 0;\n\n  const columns: Column<Customer>[] = [\n    { header: \"Name\", cell: fullName },\n    { header: \"Phone\", cell: (c) => <span className=\"tnum\">{c.person?.phoneNumber ?? \"—\"}</span> },\n    { header: \"Loyalty card\", cell: (c) => c.loyaltyCardNumber || \"NA\" },\n    { header: \"Source\", cell: (c) => (c.sourceId != null ? sourceMap.get(String(c.sourceId)) ?? \"—\" : \"—\") },\n    { header: \"Gender\", cell: (c) => genderLabel(c.gender) },\n    { header: \"Points\", align: \"right\", cell: (c) => Number(c.points ?? 0) },\n    { header: \"Created\", cell: (c) => fmtDate(c.createdDate) },\n  ];\n\n  const selectCls = \"h-[38px] rounded-full border border-border bg-surface px-3.5 text-sm text-ink-2 outline-none focus:border-brand\";\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex flex-col gap-5\">\n      <div className=\"flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-[25px] font-bold tracking-tight\">Customers</h1>\n        {configured && (\n          <span className=\"grid h-7 min-w-7 place-items-center rounded-full bg-surface-2 px-2 text-sm font-semibold text-ink-2\">\n            {count.toLocaleString(\"en-IN\")}\n          </span>\n        )}\n        <div className=\"flex-1\" />\n        <Button variant=\"primary\" onClick={() => setNewOpen(true)}>\n          <Plus className=\"h-4 w-4\" /> New Customer\n        </Button>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3\">\n        <label className=\"flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-border bg-surface px-3.5 py-2\">\n          <Search className=\"h-4 w-4 text-ink-3\" />\n          <input\n            value={search}\n            onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}\n            placeholder=\"Search name, phone…\"\n            className=\"w-56 bg-transparent text-sm outline-none placeholder:text-ink-3\"\n          />\n          {isFetching && <Loader2 className=\"h-4 w-4 animate-spin text-ink-3\" />}\n        </label>\n\n        <select value={source} onChange={(e) => { setSource(e.target.value); setPage(1); }} className={selectCls}>\n          <option value=\"\">Lead Source</option>\n          {(sources ?? []).map((s) => (\n            <option key={String(s.id)} value={String(s.id)}>{s.source}</option>\n          ))}\n        </select>\n\n        <select value={gender} onChange={(e) => { setGender(e.target.value); setPage(1); }} className={selectCls}>\n          <option value=\"\">Gender</option>\n          <option value=\"0\">Male</option>\n          <option value=\"1\">Female</option>\n          <option value=\"2\">Other</option>\n        </select>\n      </div>\n\n      <DataTable\n        columns={columns}\n        rows={data?.customers ?? []}\n        getRowId={(c) => String(c.personId ?? c.id ?? c.loyaltyCardNumber ?? c.person?.phoneNumber)}\n        configured={configured}\n        loading={isLoading}\n        page={page}\n        maxPage={Math.max(1, Math.ceil(count / LIMIT))}\n        count={count}\n        onPage={setPage}\n        emptyText=\"No customers found.\"\n        countNoun=\"customers\"\n      />\n\n      <NewCustomerModal\n        open={newOpen}\n        onClose={() => setNewOpen(false)}\n        onCreated={() => qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"customers\"] })}\n      />\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":54,"oldLines":6,"newStart":54,"newLines":13,"lines":["     { header: \"Gender\", cell: (c) => genderLabel(c.gender) },","     { header: \"Points\", align: \"right\", cell: (c) => Number(c.points ?? 0) },","     { header: \"Created\", cell: (c) => fmtDate(c.createdDate) },","+    { header: \"Last Sale\", cell: () => <span className=\"font-semibold text-brand/80\">View Sales</span> },","+    {","+      header: \"Action\",","+      cell: (c) => (","+        <button onClick={() => setEditCustomer(c)} className=\"font-semibold text-brand hover:underline\">Edit</button>","+      ),","+    },","   ];"," ","   const selectCls = \"h-[38px] rounded-full border border-border bg-surface px-3.5 text-sm text-ink-2 outline-none focus:border-brand\";"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"18ac695e-538b-41aa-a50b-f8e42aac680d","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2","sessionId":"872ce0df-5798-42c6-8c8a-7c55b2e4a344","version":"2.1.187","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"snuggly-honking-sloth"}

{"parentUuid":"ca3ac9fd-5e8b-4874-81c3-30d34b7efcb1","isSidechain":false,"promptId":"0b433365-1567-44bc-af2c-45f4bb583047","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QEfA9VPVy9VweYppG6o71d","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2/src/features/customers/Customers.tsx has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)"}]},"uuid":"89dda8d7-b06e-4052-ac13-2bbf34918318","timestamp":"2026-06-25T08:24:48.985Z","toolUseResult":{"filePath":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2/src/features/customers/Customers.tsx","oldString":"      <NewCustomerModal\n        open={newOpen}\n        onClose={() => setNewOpen(false)}\n        onCreated={() => qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"customers\"] })}\n      />","newString":"      <NewCustomerModal\n        open={newOpen || !!editCustomer}\n        editCustomer={editCustomer}\n        onClose={() => { setNewOpen(false); setEditCustomer(null); }}\n        onCreated={() => qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"customers\"] })}\n      />","originalFile":"import { useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useQueryClient } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { Search, Plus, Loader2 } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { isApiConfigured } from \"@/lib/apiClient\";\nimport { useListState } from \"@/lib/useListState\";\nimport { DataTable, type Column } from \"@/components/DataTable\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/primitives\";\nimport { NewCustomerModal } from \"@/features/sales/NewCustomerModal\";\nimport { useCustomers, useLeadSources, type Customer } from \"./api\";\n\nconst LIMIT = 20;\n\nconst fullName = (c: Customer) =>\n  [c.person?.firstName, c.person?.lastName].filter(Boolean).join(\" \") || \"—\";\n\nconst genderLabel = (g: Customer[\"gender\"]) => {\n  const s = String(g ?? \"\");\n  if (s === \"0\" || /^male$/i.test(s)) return \"Male\";\n  if (s === \"1\" || /^female$/i.test(s)) return \"Female\";\n  return s ? s : \"—\";\n};\n\nconst fmtDate = (d?: string) => {\n  if (!d) return \"—\";\n  const dt = new Date(d);\n  return isNaN(dt.getTime()) ? d : dt.toLocaleDateString(\"en-IN\", { day: \"numeric\", month: \"short\", year: \"numeric\" });\n};\n\nexport function Customers() {\n  const { search, setSearch, debounced, page, setPage } = useListState();\n  const [source, setSource] = useState(\"\");\n  const [gender, setGender] = useState(\"\");\n  const [newOpen, setNewOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [editCustomer, setEditCustomer] = useState<Customer | null>(null);\n  const configured = isApiConfigured();\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n\n  const { data, isLoading, isFetching } = useCustomers(page, LIMIT, debounced, source, gender);\n  const { data: sources } = useLeadSources();\n\n  const sourceMap = useMemo(() => {\n    const m = new Map<string, string>();\n    (sources ?? []).forEach((s) => m.set(String(s.id), s.source));\n    return m;\n  }, [sources]);\n\n  const count = data?.count ?? 0;\n\n  const columns: Column<Customer>[] = [\n    { header: \"Name\", cell: fullName },\n    { header: \"Phone\", cell: (c) => <span className=\"tnum\">{c.person?.phoneNumber ?? \"—\"}</span> },\n    { header: \"Loyalty card\", cell: (c) => c.loyaltyCardNumber || \"NA\" },\n    { header: \"Source\", cell: (c) => (c.sourceId != null ? sourceMap.get(String(c.sourceId)) ?? \"—\" : \"—\") },\n    { header: \"Gender\", cell: (c) => genderLabel(c.gender) },\n    { header: \"Points\", align: \"right\", cell: (c) => Number(c.points ?? 0) },\n    { header: \"Created\", cell: (c) => fmtDate(c.createdDate) },\n    { header: \"Last Sale\", cell: () => <span className=\"font-semibold text-brand/80\">View Sales</span> },\n    {\n      header: \"Action\",\n      cell: (c) => (\n        <button onClick={() => setEditCustomer(c)} className=\"font-semibold text-brand hover:underline\">Edit</button>\n      ),\n    },\n  ];\n\n  const selectCls = \"h-[38px] rounded-full border border-border bg-surface px-3.5 text-sm text-ink-2 outline-none focus:border-brand\";\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex flex-col gap-5\">\n      <div className=\"flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-[25px] font-bold tracking-tight\">Customers</h1>\n        {configured && (\n          <span className=\"grid h-7 min-w-7 place-items-center rounded-full bg-surface-2 px-2 text-sm font-semibold text-ink-2\">\n            {count.toLocaleString(\"en-IN\")}\n          </span>\n        )}\n        <div className=\"flex-1\" />\n        <Button variant=\"primary\" onClick={() => setNewOpen(true)}>\n          <Plus className=\"h-4 w-4\" /> New Customer\n        </Button>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3\">\n        <label className=\"flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-border bg-surface px-3.5 py-2\">\n          <Search className=\"h-4 w-4 text-ink-3\" />\n          <input\n            value={search}\n            onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}\n            placeholder=\"Search name, phone…\"\n            className=\"w-56 bg-transparent text-sm outline-none placeholder:text-ink-3\"\n          />\n          {isFetching && <Loader2 className=\"h-4 w-4 animate-spin text-ink-3\" />}\n        </label>\n\n        <select value={source} onChange={(e) => { setSource(e.target.value); setPage(1); }} className={selectCls}>\n          <option value=\"\">Lead Source</option>\n          {(sources ?? []).map((s) => (\n            <option key={String(s.id)} value={String(s.id)}>{s.source}</option>\n          ))}\n        </select>\n\n        <select value={gender} onChange={(e) => { setGender(e.target.value); setPage(1); }} className={selectCls}>\n          <option value=\"\">Gender</option>\n          <option value=\"0\">Male</option>\n          <option value=\"1\">Female</option>\n          <option value=\"2\">Other</option>\n        </select>\n      </div>\n\n      <DataTable\n        columns={columns}\n        rows={data?.customers ?? []}\n        getRowId={(c) => String(c.personId ?? c.id ?? c.loyaltyCardNumber ?? c.person?.phoneNumber)}\n        configured={configured}\n        loading={isLoading}\n        page={page}\n        maxPage={Math.max(1, Math.ceil(count / LIMIT))}\n        count={count}\n        onPage={setPage}\n        emptyText=\"No customers found.\"\n        countNoun=\"customers\"\n      />\n\n      <NewCustomerModal\n        open={newOpen}\n        onClose={() => setNewOpen(false)}\n        onCreated={() => qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"customers\"] })}\n      />\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":122,"oldLines":8,"newStart":122,"newLines":9,"lines":["       />"," ","       <NewCustomerModal","-        open={newOpen}","-        onClose={() => setNewOpen(false)}","+        open={newOpen || !!editCustomer}","+        editCustomer={editCustomer}","+        onClose={() => { setNewOpen(false); setEditCustomer(null); }}","         onCreated={() => qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"customers\"] })}","       />","     </div>"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"ca3ac9fd-5e8b-4874-81c3-30d34b7efcb1","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2","sessionId":"872ce0df-5798-42c6-8c8a-7c55b2e4a344","version":"2.1.187","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"snuggly-honking-sloth"}

{"parentUuid":"a8215e90-f942-4de5-b545-7e09b2ab9d16","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01LbqaXz7ViH5EpEBDJj5WZp","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01BHe8k6P9tSLnHfoSeV4FTc","name":"mcp__claude-in-chrome__javascript_tool","input":{"action":"javascript_exec","text":"(() => {\n  if(!window.__clpatch){\n    const orig=window.fetch;\n    window.fetch=async(...a)=>{const r=await orig(...a);try{if(/\\/customers\\/\\?page/.test(String(a[0]))) r.clone().json().then(j=>window.__clist=j).catch(()=>{});}catch(e){}return r;};\n    window.__clpatch=true;\n  }\n  const headers=[...document.querySelectorAll('thead th')].map(t=>t.innerText.trim());\n  // padding check: points cell vs created cell distinct\n  const firstRow=[...document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr')][0];\n  const cells=firstRow?[...firstRow.querySelectorAll('td')].map(td=>td.innerText.trim()):[];\n  return {\n    headers,\n    hasLastSale: headers.includes('LAST SALE') || headers.includes('Last Sale'),\n    hasAction: headers.includes('ACTION') || headers.includes('Action'),\n    firstRowCells: cells,\n    personSampleKeys: window.__clist ? {"parentUuid":"c53fee6b-7f54-4dd4-aaf0-bf2096895dbc","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01WSYKdgED6S1pW2NHCQ4tka","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01TwgjMeifAFpr8rZBLatMrZ","name":"mcp__claude-in-chrome__javascript_tool","input":{"action":"javascript_exec","text":"(() => {\n  if(!window.__upatch){\n    const orig=window.fetch;\n    window.fetch=async(...a)=>{const r=await orig(...a);try{if(/\\/customers\\/\\d+$/.test(String(a[0]).split('?')[0])&&a[1]?.method==='PATCH'){r.clone().json().then(j=>window.__updated={status:r.status,body:j}).catch(()=>window.__updated={status:r.status});}}catch(e){}return r;};\n    window.__upatch=true;\n  }\n  window.__updated=undefined;\n  const setVal=(el,v)=>{const s=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set;s.call(el,v);el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));};\n  const inputs=[...document.querySelectorAll('form input')];\n  setVal(inputs[1],'Edited');  // Last Name\n  [...document.querySelectorAll('form button')].find(b=>/Save changes/.test(b.innerText)).click();\n  return new Promise(res=>setTimeout(()=>res({\n    patch: window.__updated || 'pending',\n    modalClosed: ![...document.querySelectorAll('h2')].some(h=>/Edit Customer/.test(h.textContent))\n  }),1800));\n})()","tabId":1789287156},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":131,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1214,"cache_read_input_tokens":931691,"output_tokens":889,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1214,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":131,"output_tokens":889,"cache_read_input_tokens":931691,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1214,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1214},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"diagnostics":null},"requestId":"req_011CcPfG8rurT2GEDBAGustY","attributionMcpServer":"claude-in-chrome","attributionMcpTool":"javascript_tool","type":"assistant","uuid":"87d78e80-2094-4acc-941d-addce5c5ba7d","timestamp":"2026-06-25T08:27:09.088Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2","sessionId":"872ce0df-5798-42c6-8c8a-7c55b2e4a344","version":"2.1.187","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"snuggly-honking-sloth"}
