{"parentUuid":"0aaeadfa-dcc9-4ab4-aa1c-496d1491d503","isSidechain":false,"promptId":"0b433365-1567-44bc-af2c-45f4bb583047","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01132pKdyTEuPefGG8ZQF1CD","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2/src/lib/apiClient.ts has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)"}]},"uuid":"ee05c62e-34d4-4708-b4b8-4f0f02747cb9","timestamp":"2026-06-25T08:28:03.625Z","toolUseResult":{"filePath":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2/src/lib/apiClient.ts","oldString":"  if (!res.ok) {\n    const text = await res.text().catch(() => res.statusText);\n    throw new ApiError(res.status, text || `Request failed (${res.status})`);\n  }\n  return (await res.json()) as T;\n}","newString":"  if (!res.ok) {\n    const text = await res.text().catch(() => res.statusText);\n    throw new ApiError(res.status, text || `Request failed (${res.status})`);\n  }\n  // Some endpoints (e.g. PATCH) return 200/204 with an empty body — don't choke on it.\n  const body = await res.text();\n  return (body ? JSON.parse(body) : undefined) as T;\n}","originalFile":"/**\n * Typed port of the existing yumpos-ui apiClient contract:\n * - x-api-key + Bearer token (localStorage `yumpos_token`)\n * - 401 => clear token + redirect to \"/\"\n * Same headers/behaviour so it talks to the existing backend unchanged.\n */\nconst BASE_URL = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL ?? \"\";\nconst API_KEY = import.meta.env.VITE_API_KEY ?? \"\";\n\nconst TOKEN_KEY = \"yumpos_token\";\n\nexport class ApiError extends Error {\n  constructor(public status: number, message: string) {\n    super(message);\n    this.name = \"ApiError\";\n  }\n}\n\nexport const isApiConfigured = () => Boolean(BASE_URL && API_KEY);\n\nfunction headers(): HeadersInit {\n  const token = localStorage.getItem(TOKEN_KEY);\n  return {\n    \"x-api-key\": API_KEY,\n    accept: \"application/json\",\n    \"content-type\": \"application/json\",\n    authorization: `Bearer ${token ?? \"\"}`,\n  };\n}\n\nasync function handle<T>(res: Response): Promise<T> {\n  if (res.status === 401) {\n    localStorage.removeItem(TOKEN_KEY);\n    if (typeof window !== \"undefined\" && window.location.pathname !== \"/login\") {\n      window.location.href = \"/login\";\n    }\n    throw new ApiError(401, \"Unauthorized\");\n  }\n  if (!res.ok) {\n    const text = await res.text().catch(() => res.statusText);\n    throw new ApiError(res.status, text || `Request failed (${res.status})`);\n  }\n  return (await res.json()) as T;\n}\n\nexport const api = {\n  get: <T>(url: string, signal?: AbortSignal) =>\n    fetch(`${BASE_URL}${url}`, { headers: headers(), signal }).then(handle<T>),\n  post: <T>(url: string, body?: unknown) =>\n    fetch(`${BASE_URL}${url}`, { method: \"POST\", headers: headers(), body: JSON.stringify(body ?? {}) }).then(handle<T>),\n  patch: <T>(url: string, body?: unknown) =>\n    fetch(`${BASE_URL}${url}`, { method: \"PATCH\", headers: headers(), body: JSON.stringify(body ?? {}) }).then(handle<T>),\n  put: <T>(url: string, body?: unknown) =>\n    fetch(`${BASE_URL}${url}`, { method: \"PUT\", headers: headers(), body: JSON.stringify(body ?? {}) }).then(handle<T>),\n  delete: <T>(url: string, body?: unknown) =>\n    fetch(`${BASE_URL}${url}`, { method: \"DELETE\", headers: headers(), body: JSON.stringify(body ?? {}) }).then(handle<T>),\n};\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":40,"oldLines":7,"newStart":40,"newLines":9,"lines":["     const text = await res.text().catch(() => res.statusText);","     throw new ApiError(res.status, text || `Request failed (${res.status})`);","   }","-  return (await res.json()) as T;","+  // Some endpoints (e.g. PATCH) return 200/204 with an empty body — don't choke on it.","+  const body = await res.text();","+  return (body ? JSON.parse(body) : undefined) as T;"," }"," "," export const api = {"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"0aaeadfa-dcc9-4ab4-aa1c-496d1491d503","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2","sessionId":"872ce0df-5798-42c6-8c8a-7c55b2e4a344","version":"2.1.187","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"snuggly-honking-sloth"}

{"parentUuid":"79d1f96e-3e9d-4de1-a6f3-1fd9d414ea6c","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01NeRfWkthqVrVFCerk2bP7J","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01G2xb6MZjv9ngBDbmPjhJqz","name":"mcp__claude-in-chrome__javascript_tool","input":{"action":"javascript_exec","text":"(() => {\n  return new Promise(res=>setTimeout(()=>{\n    const firstName=[...document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr')][0]?.querySelector('td')?.innerText.trim();\n    // open edit, change lastName back to '', save, verify modal closes\n    const editBtn=[...document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr button')].find(b=>b.textContent.trim()==='Edit');\n    editBtn.click();\n    setTimeout(()=>{\n      const setVal=(el,v)=>{const s=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set;s.call(el,v);el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));};\n      setVal([...document.querySelectorAll('form input')][1],'');  // clear last name back\n      [...document.querySelectorAll('form button')].find(b=>/Save changes/.test(b.innerText)).click();\n      setTimeout(()=>res({\n        firstRowAfterEarlierPatch:firstName,\n        modalClosedOnSave: ![...document.querySelectorAll('h2')].some(h=>/Edit Customer/.test(h.textContent))\n      }),1800);\n    },500);\n  },800));\n})()","tabId":1789287156},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":70,"cache_creation_input_tokens":451,"cache_read_input_tokens":937668,"output_tokens":544,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":451,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":70,"output_tokens":544,"cache_read_input_tokens":937668,"cache_creation_input_tokens":451,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":451},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"diagnostics":null},"requestId":"req_011CcPfRLrUtmfnYVaDh2ziw","attributionMcpServer":"claude-in-chrome","attributionMcpTool":"navigate","type":"assistant","uuid":"a18687d6-c050-4355-8cd4-d6204e6d292a","timestamp":"2026-06-25T08:29:05.806Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2","sessionId":"872ce0df-5798-42c6-8c8a-7c55b2e4a344","version":"2.1.187","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"snuggly-honking-sloth"}

(I reverted the test record's last name back.)\n\nAll four verified:\n1. **Column padding fixed** — Points and Created no longer collide.\n2. **Last Sale** (View Sales) + **Action** (Edit) columns added.\n3. **Edit customer** — opens prefilled, PATCH `/customers/:id` → 200 → closes + refreshes.\n4. **apiClient** now tolerates empty 200/204 responses (a general bug that would've hit other mutations too).\n\nCommitting."}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":131,"cache_creation_input_tokens":732,"cache_read_input_tokens":938119,"output_tokens":1062,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":732,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":131,"output_tokens":1062,"cache_read_input_tokens":938119,"cache_creation_input_tokens":732,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":732},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"diagnostics":null},"requestId":"req_011CcPfSMzifcTKQNMqEjb13","attributionMcpServer":"claude-in-chrome","attributionMcpTool":"javascript_tool","type":"assistant","uuid":"bc3e6822-97a3-4243-a6a8-2a039e299df5","timestamp":"2026-06-25T08:29:22.860Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2","sessionId":"872ce0df-5798-42c6-8c8a-7c55b2e4a344","version":"2.1.187","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"snuggly-honking-sloth"}

fix table padding & empty responses\n\n- DataTable: add horizontal cell padding (Points/Created were colliding)\n- Customers table: Last Sale (View Sales, stub) + Action (Edit) columns\n- Edit opens the customer modal in edit mode (prefilled from list person data,\n  which includes address/email -> no clobbering); Save -> PATCH /customers/:id\n- apiClient.handle: tolerate empty 200/204 bodies (PATCH returns empty body;\n  res.json() was throwing and flipping success to error)\n- NewCustomerModal: edit mode (title/button), useUpdateCustomer\"\ngit push origin main 2>&1 | tail -2","description":"Commit + push columns + edit","timeout":120000},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":131,"cache_creation_input_tokens":732,"cache_read_input_tokens":938119,"output_tokens":1062,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":732,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":131,"output_tokens":1062,"cache_read_input_tokens":938119,"cache_creation_input_tokens":732,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":732},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"diagnostics":null},"requestId":"req_011CcPfSMzifcTKQNMqEjb13","attributionMcpServer":"claude-in-chrome","attributionMcpTool":"javascript_tool","type":"assistant","uuid":"fbfb252e-4208-44e0-9133-b9b0e0ee2bb8","timestamp":"2026-06-25T08:29:27.736Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2","sessionId":"872ce0df-5798-42c6-8c8a-7c55b2e4a344","version":"2.1.187","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"snuggly-honking-sloth"}

{"parentUuid":"7cbad177-b37a-4bec-a08f-a9b38568793d","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_013JxkhcQHQGu3VNb9tppLjR","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Done and pushed (`0a92d21`). All verified against your live API:\n\n- **Column padding fixed** — Points and Created no longer run together.\n- **Last Sale** column → \"View Sales\" (link present; the customer-sales detail view is a separate unported page, so it's a styled stub for now).\n- **Action** column → **Edit** → opens the customer modal in **edit mode**, prefilled from the list (which returns full `person` data incl. email/address, so no clobbering), and **Save → PATCH `/customers/:id` → 200** → modal closes + list refreshes.\n- **Bonus bug fix:** the API returns empty bodies on PATCH, and my client was calling `res.json()` on them and turning success into an error. Fixed in `apiClient.handle()` — this would've bitten other mutations too (incl. POS complete-sale if `/sales` ever returns an empty body).\n\nCustomers page is now complete: filters (search/lead source/gender), count, latest-first sort, New Customer, View Sales, Edit.\n\nNext page?
